pageContext.name: Murder Legendre (Black & White Version)
pageContext.description: Bela Lugosi starred in the 1932 movie White Zombie, the first movie made about the walking undead. He plays Murder Legendre an evil voodoo master who compels innocents to do his bidding. He controls others by drugging them and using a wax doll to force their obedience.   Star Ace and Sideshow are proud to present the Murder Legendre (Black & White Version) Sixth Scale Collectible Figure in celebration for the 90th anniversary of the film. It features an authentic likeness of Bela Lugosi. His faithful costume features a black cloak and hat and he comes with a wax doll of his victim.  With an edition size of 200 pieces, this item also includes a 1:1 scale ring for this Black and White version only.
